overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas showing the player character CJ walking and running along a sunny coastal beach. The character moves along the shoreline past palm trees, other beachgoers, and a wooden pier, with the Los Santos city skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline with ocean waves

events.description: character turns left away from water's edge and walks onto dry sand
character moves from shoreline to inner beach area with more pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the beach, initially near the water then moving inland toward other beachgoers

notable_agents.action: beachgoer walking parallel to the shoreline

entered.detail: calm blue ocean with gentle waves lapping at the shore
tan colored sand stretching along the coastline
grassy hill with rocks extending into the ocean
tall palm trees lining the back of the beach
long wooden structure extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the player character walking along the water's edge on a sunny beach. The ocean stretches to the right while palm trees line the left. The character gradually moves inland onto dry sand, passing sparse groups of pedestrians. A wooden pier and rocky headland are visible in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy beach area with scattered pedestrians

events.description: character turns right and begins running briefly
character turns left back toward the ocean shoreline

agents.ego_description: navigating through groups of pedestrians on the beach, changing direction multiple times while moving toward the water

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and standing on the sand
beachgoer in orange shorts running across the sand

entered.detail: tall modern buildings and skyscrapers visible in the distance
blue-roofed structure with stairs on the beach

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a moderately crowded section of the beach, navigating around groups of pedestrians. The camera turns multiple times, showing different angles of the beach, the distant city skyline, and the ocean. The character briefly runs before turning back toward the water's edge.

events.description: character slows to a walk along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shoreline with ocean waves to the right, approaching the wooden pier structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking steadily along the shoreline with waves lapping at the sand to the right. The wooden pier becomes more prominent in the center of the view, and the rocky headland reappears in the distance. Fewer pedestrians are visible as the character moves along the water's edge toward the pier structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastline that shifts from the open beach into a crowded pedestrian area before returning to the quiet shoreline. It begins with the character walking along the water's edge beside a line of palm trees, gradually moving inland across the dry sand toward a distant wooden pier and rocky headland. As the character enters a more crowded section of the beach, the camera pivots multiple times to capture the surrounding ocean and the distant city skyline while the character briefly breaks into a run. The scene then shifts back toward the water, where the character walks steadily as waves lap at the sand. Finally, the view clears of pedestrians as the camera focuses on the wooden pier and rocky headland becoming more prominent in the distance.
